title: Starter Kits
description: Gives new players some starting gear when they first join your game.
body:
## Need help? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/2698cavvue).

## Overview
**Starter Kits** is a data pack that gives new players gear upon first joining your server. When a player first spawns in, they will receive:
- Wooden Sword
- Wooden Pickaxe
- Wooden Axe
- Leather Chestplate
- Leather Boots
- 16 Cooked Beef
- Empty Map

If you die, you will not respawn with a new kit.
